description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton labeled 'Faragello Gold Premium Mango Nectar from Mango Pulp.' The front features a large, realistic image of a ripe mango with a green leaf, set against a white background with gold and yellow text. One side displays a vertical gold stripe with the word 'FARAGELLO' in bold, and the other side contains a barcode, recycling information, and additional product details. The back of the carton is densely covered with nutritional facts, ingredients, and a smaller mango illustration. The packaging appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice cartons, with a sealed top. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on the mango imagery and gold branding.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'Faragello Gold Premium Mango Nectar,' featuring a large mango image and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with a barcode, recycling logo, and some product details in small print.
description_view_1: The front view displays the 'Faragello Gold' branding, a large mango image, and the product name in gold text.
description_view_2: This side features a bold vertical gold stripe with 'FARAGELLO' and 'Premium Mango Nectar' text.
description_view_3: The back view is covered with nutritional facts, ingredients, and a small mango illustration at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Faragello' brand logo is visible on the front and side of the carton, in gold and white text, with a modern sans-serif font.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the carton shows a large mango image and the text 'Premium Mango Nectar from Mango Pulp,' clearly indicating mango flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the carton, along with other product information.
